TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tgbin = Gaga mniq Tayungsu Hpingcyu ka alang Tgbin. 135 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 424 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 72% niqan 306 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 28% niqan 118 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 69%, Paiwan 1%, Bunun 1%.
S.PHON: = tgbin = gaga mniq tajuŋsu ħpiŋʦju ka alaŋ tgbin. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, paiwan *%, bunun *%.
S.FORM: = Tgbin = Gaga mniq Tayungsu Hpingcyu ka alang Tgbin. 135 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 424 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 72% niqan 306 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 28% niqan 118 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 69%, Paiwan 1%, Bunun 1%.
S.PHON: = tgbin = gaga mniq tajuŋsu ħpiŋʦju ka alaŋ tgbin. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, paiwan *%, bunun *%.
